title: used_input?/1 gating for untouched fields
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/signup_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SignupLive). mount assigns @form = to_form(MyApp.Accounts.change_user(%MyApp.Accounts.User{})). Render a form that displays per-field error messages only if used_input?(@form[:field]) is true. Use <.input field={@form[:email]} /> etc. handle_event("validate", params, socket) re-runs the changeset with action :validate and calls to_form. Must use used_input?.
tier_rationale: Requires the lesser-known used_input?/1 function. Multi-step wiring with validate cycle.
research_citation: Phoenix LiveView form-bindings: 'used_input?/1 can be used to filter error messages'
